Product Info

The content of this product is provided by machine translation and may not reflect the actual information, please take this into consideration before booking.

— About Dolphin Farm Auto Camping Ground —

Enjoy your stay at Dolphin Farm Auto Camping Ground by choosing from a variety of accommodation types. There are the classic cottages as well as the highly popular glamping tents. The camping-space-to-guest-ratio is kept low to ensure comfort and privacy. Relax and take your time enjoying the beauty of the island. You can also watch the dolphins swimming nearby for free.

[Glamping Accommodation Types]

1. Dome Tents A, B and C (28.3㎡) (for 2-5 people)

  • This is a dome-shaped tent that is popular for glamping. Watch the dolphins and the beautiful sunset right in front of you
  • Inclusive of double bed, air conditioner, refrigerator, microwave oven, electric kettle
  • Towels, toothbrushes, etc. are not provided 
  • Dome tents A and B do not have clear tents

2. Lotus Belle/Onion-Shaped Tent (20㎡) (for 4-6 people)

  • As the name suggests, these cute tents are shaped like a lotus and were designed by Lotus Belle Tents, a company based in Australia
  • The unique shape of the tent attracts many tourists, and Dolphin Farm is one of the few camping grounds in Japan to have them
  • Inclusive of 2-3 double-sized air beds (depending on number of occupants), bedding, lighting, 100-volt electrical outlet (up to 2000 watts), cooler box
  • A fan is also provided if you're staying in the summer. Meanwhile, oil heaters or blankets are provided in winter
  • Towels, toothbrushes, etc. are not provided

3. Yacht (9.5 m2) (for 2 people) 

  • A secret base for all ages! You can enjoy an extraordinary experience 
  • Dolphins can be observed (until 05:00pm) 
  • Facilities: sleeping bag, air-conditioning/heating, microwave, electric kettle, cooler box with power supply, 100V outlet (up to 2000W)
  • Towels, toothbrushes, etc. are not provided

[Cottage Accommodation Types]

1. Journey (21㎡) (for 2-5 people)

  • Journey is the world's first mobile home with a rooftop. On the rooftop, you can watch the beautiful sunrise while drinking your morning coffee, or relax with the sunset and the starry night sky
  • Inclusive of unit bathroom, system kitchen, double bed, loft, air conditioner, TV, floor heating, refrigerator, microwave oven, etc.
  • Kitchen appliances and utensils: IH stove (1 stovetop), electric kettle, frying pan (16 cm), saucepan (16 cm), kitchen knife, cutting board, bowls (2), cooking chopsticks, ladle, turner, drinking glasses (5), mugs (5), small plates (5), medium-sized plates (5), disposable chopsticks, spoon and fork, dishwashing liquid, sponge
  • Bathroom toiletries: Shampoo, conditioner, body soap, hairdryer (in the dressing room), hand soap (at the sink)
  • Towels, toothbrushes, etc. are not provided

2. Comfort Cabin (21㎡) (for 2-5 people)

  • This Royal mobile home is designed for long stays and maximum comfort
  • Inclusive of bathroom, toilet, system kitchen, double bed, loft, air conditioner, TV, refrigerator, microwave oven, etc.
  • Kitchen appliances and utensils: IH stove (1 stovetop), electric kettle, frying pan (16 cm), saucepan (16 cm), kitchen knife, cutting board, bowls (2), cooking chopsticks, ladle, turner, drinking glasses (5), mugs (5), small plates (5), medium-sized plates (5), disposable chopsticks, spoon and fork, dishwashing liquid, sponge
  • Bathroom toiletries: Shampoo, conditioner, body soap, hairdryer (in the dressing room), hand soap (at the sink)
  • Towels, toothbrushes, etc. are not provided

For more details, please check the official website of Dolphin Farm Shimanami and Dolphin Farm Auto Camping Ground.

From your cottage rooftop, you can also watch the dolphins swimming at the beach nearby for free

The dolphin beach boasts a gorgeous and romantic sunset (Room: Cottage Comfort Cabin)

The dome tents, popular for glamping, are like a secret hideout. They are fully equipped with heating and air conditioning, so you can stay comfortable all year round. (Photo left: Dome Tent A olive green, photo right: Dome Tent B beige)

The cute Lotus Belle tents stand out for their unique shape. Dolphin Farm is one of the few camping grounds in Japan to have them

You can enjoy barbecue on the rooftop overlooking the sea

See the map of Dolphin Farm Auto Camping Ground

The ingredients for the barbecue vary per season. This photo is for sample purposes only

The yacht feels like a secret base that can be enjoyed by both adults and children! Experience an extraordinary space unlike anything you encounter in everyday life

Purchase Notice

  • The cottages and dome tents can accommodate 2 people or more, while the Lotus Belle tent can accommodate 4 people or more. If your group does not meet the required number of occupants, you will be asked to pay an additional children's fee
  • Towels, toothbrushes, etc. are not provided. Kindly bring your own
  • Please click here to check the notes on the national travel support program (全国旅行支援)
  • Guests who use the national travel support program coupon are deemed to have agreed to the precautions

Reminders

  • The camping site may cancel your reservations in case of typhoons or bad weather that may damage the tents. In such cases, you will not incur any cancellation fees

  • Pets and unauthorized entry by anyone other than guests are strictly prohibited.

  • All rooms are non-smoking.

  • Cooking indoors that leaves behind odors, such as grilled meat or hotpot, is prohibited.

Experience Location

Location Name: Dolphin Farm Auto Camping Ground

Address: 1673 Hakatacho Kanoura, Imabari City, Ehime Prefecture, 794-2302, Japan

What is KKday Marketplace?
